---
title: "Lecture 8: Intro to `tidyr`"
date: 2025-07-22
summary: "<strong>Tidying Data with `tidyr`</strong>"
url_slides: 08-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/08-tidyr
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Readings
